recipe.title: Lasagne dumpling

ingredients.name: Porc hache maigre cru
ingredients.note: Main juicy filling; must cook fully to 71 C / 160 F.

ingredients.name: Champignons shiitake
ingredients.note: Finely chopped for dark savory flecks in the filling.

ingredients.name: Oignons verts
ingredients.note: Chopped into filling; extra sliced scallion used as garnish.

ingredients.name: Sauce soya
ingredients.quantity: 2 c. a soupe / 30 ml in filling, plus garnish to taste
ingredients.note: Dark glossy seasoning and final drizzle.

ingredients.name: Pates a dumplings
ingredients.note: Treated as flat palm-size wrappers layered like sheets, not folded dumplings.

ingredients.name: Eau
ingredients.note: Poured delicately over the top wrapper layer before steaming.

ingredients.name: Graines de sesame blanches
ingredients.note: Final dry sprinkle, visible but not excessive.

steps.text: Meler porc hache, shiitakes, oignons verts, gingembre, ail, sauce soya, hoisin, vinaigre de riz, sambal oelek et huile de sesame jusqu'a obtenir une farce uniforme.
steps.visualCue: sticky pink pork mixture with dark shiitake flecks, green scallion, red sambal dots and glossy sauce streaks
steps.textureCue: tacky, glossy, spoon-spreadable filling that clings to the bowl
steps.runwayRisk: filling can become dry gray meat paste if gloss and raw sticky texture are not specified

steps.text: Huiler legerement l'interieur d'un moule carre de 8 po / 20 cm.
steps.visualCue: thin oil sheen catching light inside a square pan
steps.textureCue: slick reflective film on pan walls and base
steps.runwayRisk: pan scale can drift into a family-size casserole unless 20 cm square is locked

steps.text: Etendre une fine couche de farce au fond du moule, couvrir de pates a dumplings cote a cote avec minimal overlap, puis repeter en alternant farce et pates. Finir avec une couche de pates.
steps.visualCue: thin 3-5 mm filling layers alternating with pale dumpling wrappers in a compact square pan
steps.textureCue: wet sticky filling spread thin, soft wrappers slumping flat without being folded
steps.runwayRisk: model may invent tomato sauce, cheese, long lasagna noodles or folded individual dumplings

steps.text: Verser delicatement 3 c. a soupe / 45 ml d'eau sur la lasagne pour humidifier la derniere couche.
steps.visualCue: small clear droplets beading on pale wrappers, no flooding
steps.textureCue: thin water shine on top wrapper layer
steps.runwayRisk: too much water can look like soup; keep pour small and controlled

steps.text: Deposer le moule dans une grande casserole, ajouter de l'eau chaude jusqu'a mi-hauteur du moule, couvrir et cuire a faible ebullition 25 minutes jusqu'a ce que le porc soit cuit et les pates tendres.
steps.visualCue: covered steamer pot, lifting lid releases steam, wrappers turn tender and slightly translucent
steps.textureCue: humid steam, tender satin wrappers, juicy opaque filling
steps.runwayRisk: avoid browning, oven baking, frying, flames or direct boiling inside the lasagna

steps.text: Finir avec un filet de sauce soya, de l'oignon vert cisele et des graines de sesame, puis servir chaud au moule ou en portions.
steps.visualCue: dark soy gloss trails, green scallion ribbons, white sesame dots, lifted square exposes stacked dumpling layers
steps.textureCue: steamy glossy top, soft cut edge, juicy layered cross-section
steps.runwayRisk: final can drift into cheesy Italian lasagna; explicitly ban tomato, cheese pull and pasta sheets

assumptions: Dumpling wrappers are treated as flat palm-size wrappers, approximately 8-10 cm wide, arranged side by side and trimmed where needed.
The square pan remains 8 in / 20 cm, yielding a compact slab about 3-5 cm tall for four portions.
Final serving favors a clean rigid turning-spatula lift showing layers because the creator asked for a sexy food-porn result.
No intermediate recipe-state images are planned except one final cutaway reference to protect the non-standard geometry and prevent tomato/cheese lasagna drift.
criticalTransformations: Raw sticky pork-shiitake filling becomes fully cooked, opaque, juicy filling without drying out.
Flat dumpling wrappers soften into tender translucent sheets while staying layered, not folded into individual dumplings.
A low square layered build becomes a compact 20 cm steamed slab with visible dumpling-lasagna strata.
Small water addition hydrates the top wrapper layer without turning the dish into soup.
Final soy drizzle, scallion and sesame create a glossy food-porn surface without covering the layer geometry.
visualTextureOpportunities: Dark soy sauce ribbon sliding over a steamy satin wrapper top.
Sticky pork filling being pressed into a thin glossy layer with shiitake and chili flecks.
Soft dumpling wrappers flopping down edge-to-edge into the square pan.
Clear water droplets beading on the pale top wrapper layer.
Lid lift releasing dense steam from the steamer setup.
White sesame rain and green scallion ribbons landing on the glossy brown top.
Rigid turning-spatula lift revealing tender stacked wrappers and juicy filling layers.
Sauce pooling lightly around a hot lifted square without flooding it.
possibleHooks: Macro opener on soy sauce gloss crawling across the steamed dumpling-lasagna top, then hard cut to a layered turning-spatula lift.
Immediate cross-section pull from the square pan: soft dumpling sheets, juicy pork layers and sesame shimmer.
Steam burst from the lid followed by a dark soy drizzle and sesame rain.
Sticky filling smear in the pan before wrappers slap down in fast ASMR cuts.
